import React,{useEffect,useState}from"react";import{Box,Button,VStack,Heading,Text,Input,HStack,Alert,AlertTitle,AlertDescription}from"@chakra-ui/react";import{ethers}from"ethers";import{useWeb3}from"./hooks/useWeb3";import{useToken}from"./hooks/useToken";import{useCooldown}from"./hooks/useCooldown";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";const App=()=>{const{provider,signer,account,connectWallet}=useWeb3();const token=useToken(signer);const[balance,setBalance]=useState("0");const[cooldown,setCooldown]=useState(0);const[alert,setAlert]=useState("");const[recipient,setRecipient]=useState("");const[amount,setAmount]=useState("");// Fetch balance and cooldown whenever account changes
useEffect(()=>{if(!account)return;const fetchData=async()=>{try{const bal=await token.balanceOf(account);setBalance(ethers.utils.formatUnits(bal,18));const rem=await token.getRemainingCooldown(account);setCooldown(Number(rem));}catch(e){console.error(e);}};fetchData();},[account,token]);// Format cooldown
const{formatted:cooldownFormatted}=useCooldown(cooldown);// Handle request tokens
const handleRequest=async()=>{if(!account)return;try{await token.requestTokens();setAlert("Tokens requested successfully!");const rem=await token.getRemainingCooldown(account);setCooldown(Number(rem));}catch(e){setAlert((e===null||e===void 0?void 0:e.reason)||"Failed to request tokens");}};// Handle mint (owner only)
const handleMint=async()=>{if(!account)return;try{await token.mint(account,ethers.utils.parseUnits(amount||"0",18));setAlert("Minted successfully!");}catch(e){setAlert((e===null||e===void 0?void 0:e.reason)||"Mint failed");}};// Handle transfer
const handleTransfer=async()=>{if(!account)return;try{await token.transfer(recipient,ethers.utils.parseUnits(amount||"0",18));setAlert("Transfer successful!");}catch(e){setAlert((e===null||e===void 0?void 0:e.reason)||"Transfer failed");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Box,{p:10,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(VStack,{spacing:6,align:"stretch",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Heading,{textAlign:"center",children:"WEB3CXIV Token Dashboard"}),!account&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{onClick:connectWallet,children:"Connect Wallet"}),account&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Text,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("b",{children:"Account:"})," ",account]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Text,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("b",{children:"Balance:"})," ",balance," CXIV"]}),cooldown>0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Text,{fontSize:"sm",color:"gray.600",children:["Faucet cooldown: ",cooldownFormatted]}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{colorScheme:"teal",onClick:handleRequest,children:"Request Tokens"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(HStack,{spacing:2,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Input,{placeholder:"Recipient Address",value:recipient,onChange:e=>setRecipient(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Input,{placeholder:"Amount",value:amount,onChange:e=>setAmount(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{colorScheme:"blue",onClick:handleTransfer,children:"Transfer"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(HStack,{spacing:2,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Input,{placeholder:"Mint Amount",value:amount,onChange:e=>setAmount(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{colorScheme:"purple",onClick:handleMint,children:"Mint"})]}),alert&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Alert,{status:"info",borderRadius:"md",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AlertTitle,{children:"Info"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AlertDescription,{children:alert})]})]})]})});};export default App;
